codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly adds a list-to-detail inspector for documents. It securely manages non-success states and ensures the selected record detail updates context correctly. Tests cover list rendering and selection-driven detail updates, satisfying all feature requirements.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker encountered port binding issues with agent-browser on Windows and fell back to executing raw Playwright scripts via the Execute tool.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff discoveredIssues notes 'agent-browser session startup failed with daemon port bind errors in this Windows environment'. Transcript shows multiple Execute calls with headless Playwright scripts instead of agent-browser.

summary: Review passed. The document inspector meets all requirements. The worker effectively bypassed an agent-browser issue on Windows by falling back to temporary Playwright scripts.
